_meta.source: K-Rad Kompact Panel Radiators brochure (Kartell UK, December 2021)
notes: water_volume is litres per metre of radiator length.
K-Rad brochure quotes water content as total litres per size — divided by width in metres to give l/m.
Type 33 water content not published — estimated at 1.5× Type 22 values, consistent with Stelrad K3/K2 ratio.
Type 21 height 700mm: limited size range (400–1000mm only).
750mm height is K-Rad specific (not in Stelrad range).
